variants: Taleah Atutahi currently resides in Currantgrove Flats and works at Harborsteel Manufacturing, where she has established herself as a dedicated employee. Born in Forestgate Fields, she pursued her studies at the Driftwood School of Letters, developing a robust skill set in her field. Her exemplary contributions to the industry were recognized when she received the Frostcliff Tribute, an honor acknowledging her commitment to excellence.
